task_description: Phase 66: Wire every remaining mock + connect every flow. Create Next.js API route handlers for all 7 Next.js apps to proxy to their Fastify backends. Fix dead-end UI elements in quantsync.

verification.summary: typecheck 109/109 pass, build 87/87 pass. 51 API route files created across 7 Next.js apps. Dead handlers fixed in quantsync. Post-review fixes: quantchat port collision (3001->3108), DELETE share handler body forwarding, download route binary streaming.
